objective: Document the current FigOps graph tool QA qualification boundary for agents before publication-facing documentation makes stronger claims.

assumptions.claim: The review is repository-internal and does not freshly verify external publisher pages.
assumptions.verification: Any external compliance claim must add a dated publisher-guideline matrix.

assumptions.claim: Aesthetic quality remains advisory unless measured by deterministic diagnostics.
assumptions.verification: Map every warning or diagnostic to FQ-H*, FQ-A*, or informational before using it as a gate.

phases.exit: Renderer, style, diagnostics, preflight, and docs evidence are identified.

phases.entry: Evidence has been collected from source files.
phases.exit: Capabilities are classified as guaranteed, conditional, best-effort, diagnostic, unsupported, or manual.
Agent-facing documentation states allowed and disallowed claims.

phases.entry: Markdown and JSON have been written.
phases.exit: JSON parses and required documentation anchors exist.

workers.owns: data contract, provenance, and preflight result interpretation
labels, legends, annotations, geometry diagnostics, and layout_report
target_format, style profile, font tokens, line-width floors, and journal token checks
visual baselines, runtime/dependency drift, and fixture coverage

parallelism.fan_in_rule: One final verdict must reconcile all hard gates and advisory findings.

verification: Check that docs/specs/2026-07-03-graph-tool-qa-review.md contains the qualification matrix and manual_review_needed claim boundary.
Check that docs/QA.md links the new qualification review.
Check that docs/internal/protocols/04_quality_gate_contract.md states the agent rule for manual_review_needed and journal-token claims.

risk_gates.safe_default: Use publication-oriented wording and require rubric verdict plus manual review state.
Say encoded FigOps token compliance unless dated external source verification is cited.

resume_plan: The markdown spec and JSON plan are deterministic. If interrupted, rerun the verification commands and continue from the first missing link.
